tasks.subject: Task 1: Base-rate resolver + toBaseTokens on PricingService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add BASE_TOKEN_MODEL const, getBaseTokenRate(), toBaseTokens() to PricingService.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.ts","packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- pricing.service","acceptanceCriteria":["BASE_TOKEN_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5","getBaseTokenRate returns inputCostPerToken or null","toBaseTokens(cost,rate) divides or returns null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Per-row baseTokens in AgentSessionService.list()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each listed row carries baseTokens (costUsd/baseRate or null).

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/agent-sessions/agent-sessions.service.ts","packages/api/src/agent-sessions/agent-sessions.service.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- agent-sessions.service","acceptanceCriteria":["list calls getBaseTokenRate once","baseTokens added per row","null when costUsd or rate null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Per-type BT split in AgentSessionService.aggregate()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** aggregate returns baseTokens {input,output,total}|null from per-model token sums priced against model rates / base rate. Adds getModelRates to PricingService.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.ts","packages/api/src/agent-sessions/agent-sessions.service.ts","packages/api/src/agent-sessions/agent-sessions.service.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- agent-sessions.service","acceptanceCriteria":["combined by:[model] groupBy sums cost+tokens","input/output USD priced per model","total~=input+output","null when base rate null","unpriced models contribute 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: totalBaseTokens in StatsService.getOverview()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Overview exposes totalBaseTokens (live cost/base rate, null when unavailable). StatsService takes PricingService via DI.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/stats/stats.service.ts","packages/api/src/stats/stats.service.test.ts","packages/api/src/stats/stats.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- stats.service","acceptanceCriteria":["constructor injects PricingService","aggregate _sum adds costUsd","totalBaseTokens converted","null when base rate null","totalTokensUsed unchanged","module DI resolves"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dashboard types + formatBaseTokens helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend client types + add formatBaseTokens.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/dashboard/src/api/client.ts","packages/dashboard/src/lib/utils.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/dashboard build","acceptanceCriteria":["AgentSessionRow.baseTokens number|null","aggregate baseTokens {input,output,total}|null","overview totalBaseTokens number|null","formatBaseTokens returns — for null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: BT column in Live Sessions table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Right-aligned BT column after Output; colSpan 10->11.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/dashboard/src/components/sessions/LiveSessionsTable.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/dashboard build","acceptanceCriteria":["BT head between Output and Cost","cell uses formatBaseTokens(row.baseTokens)","empty colSpan=11"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: BT tooltips on session summary cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Input/Output/Cost cards get Radix tooltips showing breakdown + Base Tokens.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/dashboard/src/components/sessions/SessionSummaryCards.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/dashboard build","acceptanceCriteria":["Input tooltip new+cached(%)+BT input","Output tooltip output+BT output","Cost tooltip input+output+BT total","Sessions card no tooltip","— when bt null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: BT in Overview Total Tokens Used card
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Headline shows `<BT> BT` (— when null); description shows raw token total.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/dashboard/src/pages/Overview.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/dashboard build","acceptanceCriteria":["value formatBaseTokens(totalBaseTokens)+ BT or —","description uses formatTokens(totalTokensUsed)","import formatBaseTokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Full build + test sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pnpm -r build succeeds; api tests green except 2 known webhooks 401 failures.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @jagit/api test","acceptanceCriteria":["pnpm -r build passes","api tests pass except 2 pre-existing webhooks failures"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Apply final-review fixes (BT reconcile, DRY, Redis cache, round display)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reconcile aggregate BT to cost/rate basis; DRY cache defaults + findPricing; Redis-cache model pricing lookups; round BT for display.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.ts","packages/api/src/agent-sessions/agent-sessions.service.ts","packages/dashboard/src/lib/utils.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jagit/api test && pnpm -r build","acceptanceCriteria":["aggregate baseTokens anchored to totalCostUsd/baseRate","cache defaults+findPricing DRY","redis-cached pricing lookups","formatBaseTokens rounds"]}
```
